Patch Set 1:

Hi Fiachra, just 2 quick general questions on this
1. Your review comment says "removed all the rancher stuff", but there's a modified "docs/oom_setup_kubernetes_rancher.rst" file included. Was that an oversight, or is that file still needed?
2. Re deletion of the "docs/spelling_wordlist.txt" file - I'm only guessing here, but could that file have been included as kind of a dictionary so that these words wouldn't be marked as spelled incorrectly somewhere in the docs?  (i.e., could their removal potentially cause a lot of words to be highlighted as spelling mistakes?)
Otherwise, looks ok to me.

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Hi Fiachra, just 2 quick general questions on this
> 1. Your review comment says "removed all the rancher stuff", but there's a modified "docs/oom_setup_kubernetes_rancher.rst" file included. Was that an oversight, or is that file still needed?
> 2. Re deletion of the "docs/spelling_wordlist.txt" file - I'm only guessing here, but could that file have been included as kind of a dictionary so that these words wouldn't be marked as spelled incorrectly somewhere in the docs?  (i.e., could their removal potentially cause a lot of words to be highlighted as spelling mistakes?)
> Otherwise, looks ok to me.

As far as I can see the guide was updated here - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/86683
Replacing the rancher stuff but not renaming the file.

The only place I can see the spelling file is in the tox and gitlad_ci but both are pulling from the doc repo so don't think it's needed here.
